topicPrompt: Create one strong YouTube Shorts topic idea for a {language} {niche} channel. Make it curiosity-driven and suitable for a 45-60 second video.
scriptPrompt: Write a {language} YouTube Shorts script for the topic. Include: hook, body, payoff, CTA. Keep it concise and voiceover-ready for about 60 seconds.
metadataPrompt: Create a title, description, and hashtags for the Shorts video in {language}. Keep it clickable but not spammy.
shotListPrompt: Create a stock-video shot list for this Shorts script. Return 6 to 8 short visual beats that match each script section.
thumbnailPrompt: Create short thumbnail text for the video in {language}. Maximum 5 words.
